description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, both bound together by a wide, metallic gold band that wraps around their width. The top book has a deep purple cover with a subtle marbled texture, and the word 'Arcana' is embossed in gold on its front cover. The bottom book is slightly larger, with a darker, almost black cover that appears to have a glossy finish. The pages of both books are white and tightly bound, with the edges visible from the sides. The gold band is smooth and reflective, adding a decorative and secure element to the pair. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the covers, and the overall appearance is elegant and mysterious.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, bound by a metallic gold band, with a purple marbled cover and gold-embossed title 'Arcana'. The design is elegant and minimal, with no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold band across the width and the white page edges of both books.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the gold-embossed 'Arcana' title on the purple cover and the gold band running vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gold band and the plain, marbled purple back cover with white page edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gold band and the stacked books' spines, both without visible text or decoration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is a solid purple color with subtle vertical indentations, but no visible text or decorative elements. The design is minimal and unadorned.
